tenants.tagline: Every legal advantage the tax code gives you — found, explained, and organized.

recent_audit.detail: Scanned 6 Day14 business(es) against the 48-strategy Loophole Catalog; wrote ops/tax-advantages.md per business + empire-tax-scan.md rollup.

Phase 2 (content brand) start — scheduled task life-loophole-phase2-content. Built the content foundation in content/. (1) content/content-calendar.json: a 52-week weekly content calendar (publishes Tue, planned window 2026-07-07 to 2027-06-29) mapping all 48 Loophole Catalog strategies one-per-week plus 4 special roundup editions (welcome, year-end checklist, filing-season kickoff, mid-year check-in). Sequenced into 4 seasons so deadline-sensitive strategies land ahead of their deadlines: quarterly-estimated-taxes featured W9 ahead of ~Sep 15; year-end moves (Section 179, tax-loss harvesting, capital gains, charitable giving, gift exclusion, backdoor Roth) run W17-25 before Dec 31; S-corp/PTET W34-35 ahead of ~Mar 15; filing-season credits W27-41; 14 weeks carry tax-deadline callouts. work-opportunity-tax-credit (W43) flagged status=hold per FIGURES-2026.md (WOTC authorization lapsed for post-2025 hires). (2) content/drafts/: 3 full newsletter-style sample articles — HSA contribution, quarterly estimated taxes, tax-loss harvesting — each leads with legal, built only from the catalog entry, cites the IRS source, uses only FIGURES-2026.md-verified figures labeled by tax year, carries the educational-not-advice disclaimer. (3) content/content-playbook.md: the binding repeatable format — 9-beat article structure, newsletter structure, voice rules, sourced-catalog-only requirement, qualitative-figures rule, disclaimer text+placement, professional-escalation/HOLD handling, pre-publish checklist. Verified: calendar valid JSON, all 48 catalog ids covered with no duplicates, source strings match catalog.json exactly. COMPLIANCE: every piece built only from sourced catalog entries, no free-authored tax claims, figures qualitative unless FIGURES-2026.md-verified. All outputs are DRAFTS pending Jack-tap before any external publishing. Worked only inside ~/Documents/businesses/life-loophole/; studio and alignmd repos untouched; no git push.

Scheduled task life-loophole-figure-verification — built loophole-catalog/FIGURES-2026.md, a sourced companion reference of every annually-changing figure the 48-entry catalog depends on, verified for tax year 2026 (and 2025 for comparison). ~135 figures verified, IRS primary sources preferred: Notice 2025-67 (retirement/IRA/Saver's Credit/QCD), Rev. Proc. 2025-32 (brackets, LTCG, QBI, Section 179, CTC, EITC, student loan), Rev. Proc. 2025-19 (HSA/HDHP), Notice 2026-10 (mileage 72.5c), SSA wage base ($184,500), plus IRS OBBBA guidance and well-sourced reporting for the five volatile clusters. Key OBBBA findings: bonus depreciation 100% permanent (property acquired after 1/19/2025); QSBS tiered 50/75/100% exclusion with $75M asset ceiling and $15M per-issuer cap for stock issued after 7/4/2025; Opportunity Zones made permanent with rolling 5-year deferral from 2027; lifetime gift/estate exemption permanent at $15M (2026); 401(k) catch-up $8,000 / super catch-up $11,250 / Roth catch-up wage threshold $150k. 3 items could not be verified and are isolated/marked unverified: WOTC availability/wage caps (program authorization lapsed for hires after 12/31/2025, not extended by OBBBA), Section 45E startup-credit percentage/cap structure (only the $110k comp limit verified), and the Q3/Q4 2026 IRS underpayment interest rate (not yet announced). catalog.json deliberately left unchanged — it is intentionally qualitative and this is a companion reference. Worked only inside ~/Documents/businesses/life-loophole/; no git push.

Built the Life Loophole brand landing site as an interactive prototype at brand-site/index.html, live as Cowork artifact 'life-loophole-site'. Single-page marketing site: hero, interactive Loophole Finder over the 48-strategy catalog, loophole reframe, how-it-works, five personas, sourced-strategy proof, honesty/disclaimer section, Loophole Checklist signup. Educational-not-advice disclaimers throughout. Updated LIFE-LOOPHOLE-SITE-BRIEF.md so Claude Code ports the prototype into the studio repo. No studio repo edits.

Phase 1 run 4/4 — QA'd the 48-entry Loophole Catalog: valid JSON, schema-correct (all required fields, no stray fields), 48 unique ids/no duplicates, every entry carries a real IRS source, professional_needed=true on all 15 high-complexity/high-risk entries (no schema violations), estimated_impact always ranged and 'could'-framed with no guarantee language — NO corrective fixes required. Noted all 48 entries are current_as_of 2025 and keep figures qualitative by design; built a figure-verification list, priority clusters QSBS/Opportunity Zones/gift-estate exemption/401(k) catch-ups/bonus depreciation. Drafted Phase 2 lead magnet lead-magnet-loophole-checklist.md ('The Loophole Checklist', five-persona, plain non-hype voice, educational-not-advice disclaimer). Wrote PHASE-1-PROGRESS.md. Outcome: catalog complete and QA-passed; advisor agent spec-complete but not built. Studio repo untouched; no git push.

Phase 1 run 3/4 — drafted the tax-strategist advisor agent in advisor-agent/. SKILL.md: spec covering purpose, situation inputs, personalized strategy-set outputs, five-persona detection, persona-filter + eligibility-match + ranking retrieval, mandatory educational-not-advice disclaimer, and the professional-escalation path. AGENT-DESIGN.md: system-prompt architecture and catalog-grounding mechanics — whole-catalog in-context retrieval over the 48 sourced entries, explicit out-of-catalog "I do not have a sourced strategy for that" behavior (no guessing), disclaimer enforced by defense in depth, verbatim IRS source citation from each entry. Draft and design only; no production code, studio repo untouched.

Phase 1 run 2/4 — added Loophole Catalog Block B: 26 new sourced entries covering small-business, investors-high-earners, and legal-entities personas (catalog now 48 total). Every entry carries a real IRS citation, current_as_of 2025, ranged "could" impact; dollar limits kept qualitative pending verification against current IRS guidance. professional_needed=true set on all entity/trust/high-complexity strategies.

Phase 1 run 1/4 — built Loophole Catalog Block A: loophole-catalog/catalog.json with 22 sourced entries across individuals-families and freelancers-creators personas. Every entry carries a real IRS citation, current_as_of 2025; dollar limits kept qualitative pending verification against current IRS guidance.
Phase 0 — Life Loophole tenant scaffolded: constitution, ops folder, loophole-catalog schema. Buildout plan at ~/Documents/Life-Loophole-Buildout-Plan.md

human_todos.title: Get an Anthropic API key — unblocks all agent builds
human_todos.detail: Builds (Kennum and every future business) keep dying on the Gemini 429 quota. The durable fix is the Claude fallback, now wired into the whole bootstrap chain — it just needs a key. Generate one at console.anthropic.com -> Settings -> API Keys (requires enabling API billing). Then paste the key to Claude; Claude will add it to .env.local + Vercel and re-run the Kennum build for you.

steps: Open the Anthropic Console and sign in (or create an account).
Go to Settings -> Billing and enable API billing / add a payment method — API keys do not work without it.
Go to Settings -> API Keys and click Create Key; copy the key (starts with sk-ant-).
Paste the key straight to Claude in chat — do NOT type it into any file yourself.
Claude adds it as ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env.local + Vercel and re-runs the Kennum build.

human_todos.title: Add MAILERLITE_API_KEY to .env.local + Vercel

steps: Open MailerLite and sign in (a free account is fine to start).
Go to Integrations -> Developers -> API (Account settings).
Generate a new API token and copy it.
Paste the token straight to Claude in chat — do NOT type it into any file yourself.
Claude adds it as MAILERLITE_API_KEY in .env.local + Vercel so newsletter signup goes live.
